data.title: Corporate Technologies releases research on cost of IT downtime for U.S. small businesses, highlighting significant impacts.
data.description: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota, on January 14, 2026, Corporate Technologies, a top provider of managed IT and cybersecurity services for small and medium enterprises, published a research whitepaper named "The Impact of IT Downtime on Small U.S. Businesses." This report delves into the financial implications of IT downtime on businesses in the United States.

data.title: KBRA rates Veros Auto Receivables Trust 2026-1 with $274.68 million in total notes, representing Veros Credit's first ABS of 2026.
data.description: In New York, KBRA has given initial ratings to six classes of notes from Veros Auto Receivables Trust 2026-1 (VEROS 2026-1), an auto loan ABS transaction. This marks the Company's first term ABS securitization of 2026 and its ninth overall. VEROS 2026-1 will issue a total of $274.68 million in six note classes. These Notes are backed by a pool of auto loan contracts primarily originated indirectly, largely through independent sources.

data.title: Bitcoin surges as spot ETF inflows rise, aiming for $105K; doubts remain on reaching target amid data trends.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin has seen a resurgence as inflows to spot BTC ETFs resume. However, data analysis raises doubts regarding whether the bulls will be able to drive the price up to $105,000.

data.title: Alex Foxen named PGT Player of the Year; Chad Eveslage wins $1M Championship in Las Vegas.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 14, 2026, the PokerGO Tour® (PGT®) season came to an exciting end, naming Alex Foxen as the PGT Player of the Year and Chad Eveslage as the victor of the PGT $1,000,000 Championship. Foxen clinched the Player of the Year title in the last event of the regular season, with Eveslage capturing the championship prize money.

data.title: Mission Wealth promotes 8 leaders to partner in 2026, enhancing their financial planning & wealth management services.
data.description: In Santa Barbara, California on January 14, 2026, Mission Wealth unveiled its 2026 Partner Class. The firm, known for providing extensive financial planning and wealth management services, welcomed eight new partners to its team. This announcement marks a significant expansion for Mission Wealth as they continue to grow and develop their offerings.

data.title: Herzfeld Credit Income Fund, Inc. reports December 2025 NAV of $2.14, as per news released on Jan 14, 2026.
data.description: On January 14, 2026, in Miami Beach, Florida, Herzfeld Credit Income Fund, Inc. (NASDAQ: HERZ) disclosed that the estimated net asset value ("NAV") as of December 31, 2025, was $2.14.

data.title: Canary wins Best Voice & Call Center Software award for its AI Voice solution, leading in hospitality tech.
data.description: In the latest awards by HotelTechReports, Canary has been named the winner in the Best Voice & Call Center Software category for its AI Voice solution. Canary Technologies, based in San Francisco, has been acknowledged for its top-notch AI-powered Guest Management System. The award was announced on January 14, 2026, according to a press release from PRNewswire.

data.title: American Airlines (AAL) faces turbulence post Delta's earnings beat, reflecting a k-shaped recovery, with AAL stock dipping by 2%. Factors include AI impact on premium market and fewer participants contributing to growth. Delta struggles despite focusing on premium market, signaling a warning for AAL's competitiveness. The airline doesn't have the same capability as Delta in the premium segment.Character Count: 297
data.description: Delta Air Lines Inc (NYSE: DAL) recently released its fourth-quarter earnings, beating expectations on both top and bottom lines, but still suffering a sizable drop in stock price. This downturn also affected American Airlines Group Inc (NASDAQ: AAL), causing its stock to dip more than 2%. The airline industry is facing challenges due to a "K-shaped recovery" in the economy, with growth concentrated among those willing to pay for premium services. The disruption caused by artificial intelligence is further impacting the industry, displacing white-collar professionals and reducing consumer base. Delta's focus on the premium market couldn't lift its equity value, and this could indicate challenges for American Airlines in competing in the premium sector. Invest with caution in AAL stock due to these factors.

data.title: Vienna's Bitpanda aims for $5.5B valuation in potential Frankfurt IPO by 2026, following trend of digital asset firms going public.
data.description: A crypto platform headquartered in Vienna is considering the possibility of conducting an initial public offering (IPO) in Germany in 2026. This move comes as an increasing number of digital asset firms are preparing to go public on stock exchanges.

data.title: Iranian crisis escalates, threatens regime survival. WTI crude rises to $62/barrel on concerns over oil supply disruption and US intervention.
data.description: A significant crisis has erupted in Iran, posing a severe threat to the continuation of the Islamic Republic led by Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei. The protests, initially sparked by soaring inflation and the devaluation of the Iranian rial in late December, have escalated into the most widespread anti-government demonstration since the 1979 revolution. This situation has put global markets on edge due to the uncertainty surrounding Iran's future and the possibility of Western military involvement. On Wednesday, the West Texas Intermediate crude, monitored through the United States Oil Fund (NYSE: USO), surged for the sixth consecutive session, reaching $62 per barrel, a price not witnessed in approximately three months. This increase is attributed to traders factoring in the elevated risk of potential disruptions in oil supply chains and the specter of U.S. military actions. The prevailing uncertainty has caused market analysts to view the price fluctuations as largely influenced by the evolving situation in Iran and the potential for Western intervention that could impact oil exports or critical strategic points.

data.title: New cuTile Python Guide achieves 90% cuBLAS performance for matrix ops on Blackwell GPUs, with simplified code. Learn more.
data.description: NVIDIA has unveiled a comprehensive cuTile Python tutorial for Blackwell GPUs, showcasing how matrix multiplication can achieve more than 90% of cuBLAS performance. The tutorial features simplified code that enables users to harness the power of the GPUs efficiently.

data.title: Hilton's Board authorizes $3.5 billion increase for stock repurchase program, total now $4.6 billion.
data.description: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. revealed in a recent announcement that its Board of Directors has approved a $3.5 billion augmentation in funds designated for the repurchase of common stock under the existing stock repurchase initiative. This decision elevates the total allocated amount for potential buybacks to around $4.6 billion. Hilton is permitted to acquire shares through various means like open market transactions, privately negotiated deals, or other methods determined by the company.

data.title: Granite (GVA) to expand Highway infrastructure in Nevada County with $66M contract from Caltrans, improving safety and congestion.
data.description: A California-based construction company, Granite (NYSE:GVA), has secured a significant contract worth about $66 million from the California Department of Transportation (Caltrans). The contract pertains to a highway improvement initiative in Nevada County, California. The project, funded by Federal and State contributions, will be part of Granite's 2025 fourth-quarter Consolidated Appropriations Program (CAP). It involves expanding State Route 49 to four lanes alongside a center turn lane to enhance safety, traffic efficiency, and local connectivity.

data.title: Bullish LDO forecast for Feb 2026: targets $0.75-$0.85, with 15-31% upside from current levels.
data.description: LDO is demonstrating bullish MACD signals and robust momentum above crucial moving averages. Analysts have set a target range of $0.75 to $0.85 by February 2026, indicating a potential upside of 15% to 31%.

data.title: Philadelphia launches 10-block Center City transformation; Avenue of the Arts, Inc. reimagines 1-mile stretch on South Broad Street into world cultural boulevard.
data.description: A project led by Avenue of the Arts, Inc. is underway to revamp a 1-mile section along South Broad Street in Philadelphia, stretching from City Hall to Washington Avenue. The initiative aims to create a vibrant World Cultural Boulevard, infusing art and culture into the heart of the city. As of January 14, 2026, the ambitious transformation project officially commenced, promising to reshape this significant urban area into a dynamic cultural hub.
